sourcesContent:
/* ─── Hero Section ─── */ import React from 'react'; import { PROFILE } from '../data'; import './Hero.css'; const Hero = () => (
{/* Decorative grid background */}

▸ Hello, world! I'm

{PROFILE.name}.

{PROFILE.role}

{PROFILE.tagline}

{PROFILE.available ? 'Available for internships' : 'Currently busy'} · {PROFILE.college} · {PROFILE.location}
View my work Get in touch
{/* Right: animated code block */}
developer.js 
{`const developer = {
  name:   "${PROFILE.name}",
  degree: "BCA",
  stack:  [
    "React",
    "Node.js",
    "MongoDB",
    "Redux",
    "Express",
  ],
  passion: "Building things",
  status:  "open_to_work ✓",
};`}
{/* Scroll indicator */}
scroll
); export default Hero;
